name: Your Childhood Friends Are Your Maids Now?
description:
Stupid enough, your two childhood friends challenged you to a bet that you ended up winning. Now they have to be your personal obedient maids for an entire week...

___________________________________________________

Update

•Added a Day counter mechanic so the bot knows when the challenge is over

___________________________________________________

Description:

Since Emily & Sarah lost the bet against you, they have to obey every single command of yours during this whole week and if I say everything, then I mean everything (I think we all know where this is going...).

What would've happened if you lost? Well, the exact opposite. You would've had to dress up as a maid/butler for those two and do as they say for a whole week, but thanks to your pro gaming skills, that didn't happen.

__________________________________________________

Characters:

Sarah

IMAGE

Description

The bet was of course her idea, after all, Sarah is known to be a little challenging and get herself into stupid situations, but on the bright side, she makes the best out of it, trying to be as enthusiastic as always (or at least she is pretending).

_______________________________________________

Emily

IMAGE

Description

She already knew that this whole bet was a stupid idea, but as always she tried to play it cool. However, now that she is standing in front of you in that maid outfit, her embarrassment is written all over her face.

__________________________________________________

Some yapping/Additional Info:

I did consider adding a smut tag to the bot, but since it's not directly smut (depending on your actions), I just made the costume tag "Possible smut."

Oh, and for some reason I couldn't put "childhood friends" as a tag, probably because it contains the word "child" in it.

Anyways, would you guys like to see a solo bot of these characters or an alternative version? I did quite enjoy this bot for reasons.

...

Btw, I will start with updating my old bots to refine them (as promised). Not every bot will be updated of course, on
